pendingCommands.label: FEATURE: Fix resumeParser._parseExperienceText() - parse experience blocks correctly

value.issue: Text parsing not extracting title, company, duration, description correctly from text blocks
value.testCase:
Input: 'Senior Engineer
Acme
2019 - Present
- Built APIs
Mentored team' | Expected: {title:'Senior Engineer', company:'Acme', duration:'2019 - Present', description:['Built APIs','Mentored team']}
value.prompt: FIX resumeParser._parseExperienceText(text). Parse text blocks where line[0]=title, line[1]=company. Find line with '20XX - 20XX' or '20XX - Present' pattern → that's duration. Lines starting with '-' or '*' → description. Currently returns empty company/duration/description. Rewrite the parsing logic to correctly extract these fields from the text input.
TEST: npm test -- tests/unit/automation/resumeParser.test.js. Report: Pass/fail count. If PASS, continue. If FAIL, escalate to local-review-agent with error output.

pendingCommands.label: RUN: npm run lint to ensure no new linting errors introduced

value.prompt: RUN: npm run lint. Report: error count. Must be ≤6 (current acceptable level). If higher, escalate.

pendingCommands.label: TEST: npm test -- --passWithNoTests full test suite (all 65+ test files)

value.prompt: TEST: npm test -- --passWithNoTests. Report: Test Suites passed/failed. Tests passed/failed. If all pass, continue to commit phase. If any fail, escalate to local-review-agent with failure details.

pendingCommands.label: RUN: npm run build to verify build succeeds

value.prompt: RUN: npm run build. Report: success/failure. If success, continue. If fail, escalate.

pendingCommands.label: ADMIN: git checkout -b fix/resumeparser-tests && commit && push (never main)

value.prompt: ADMIN: git checkout -b fix/resumeparser-tests. git add src/automation/resumeParser.js. git commit -m 'fix: resumeParser text parsing - extract title, company, duration, description from text blocks correctly. All tests passing (1386/1386), lint clean, build succeeds.' git push origin fix/resumeparser-tests. DO NOT commit to main. Report push URL.

pendingCommands.label: ADMIN: gh pr create --base develop --head fix/resumeparser-tests with CI status

value.prompt: ADMIN: gh pr create --base develop --head fix/resumeparser-tests --title 'fix: resumeParser text parsing - all tests passing' --body 'Fix resumeParser._parseExperienceText() text block parsing. All 1386 tests passing. Lint clean. Build succeeds. Ready for review and merge.'

value.prompt: MONITOR: Background job - every 10s read orchestration-controls.json and worker-state.json. Print: [GOAL {percent}%] [TESTS passing/total] [LINT errors] [AGENTS {count} running] [CLAUDE 0% blocked]. This runs continuously until all tasks done.
